event: View of an Islamic mosque and cemetery
symbols: turquoise domes — the heavenly canopy in Islamic architectural tradition
cemetery surrounding the mosque — the proximity of death and worship, memento mori
cypress trees — mourning and eternal life in Near Eastern symbolism
description: A sunlit scene of a grand mosque with a large turquoise dome and two tall minarets rising against a bright blue sky with white clouds. The mosque's facade features pointed arches and blue-tiled decoration. In the foreground and surrounding the mosque lies an extensive cemetery with numerous worn, tilted gravestones and tomb markers. Several cypress trees grow among the graves. A few small figures sit or stand among the tombs at left, dressed in Middle Eastern clothing. The landscape beyond the mosque stretches out flat toward distant hills.

_meta.title: The Field of Rest Cemetary of the Green Mosque
